do_if.value: global.$GT_ReturnHomeHold? and global.$GT_ReturnHomeHold.{$object}? and global.$GT_ReturnHomeHoldUntil? and global.$GT_ReturnHomeHoldUntil.{$object}? and player.age ge global.$GT_ReturnHomeHoldUntil.{$object}

@$undock and ((global.$GT_ReturnHomeHold? and global.$GT_ReturnHomeHold.{$object}? and (not global.$GT_ReturnHomeHoldUntil? or not global.$GT_ReturnHomeHoldUntil.{$object}? or player.age lt global.$GT_ReturnHomeHoldUntil.{$object})) or ($object.order.id == 'DockAndTrain') or ($object.order.id == 'DockAndPilotExchange') or ($object.order.id == 'DockAndWait' and (@$object.order.$callerid.id == 'DockAndTrain' or @$object.order.$callerid.id == 'DockAndPilotExchange')))

debug_text.text: '[GT ORDER PATCH] Preventing undock for GT dock wrapper order on ship: ' + $object.knownname + ' order=' + @$object.order.id
